content: v GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET LINIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. 1Q3 /GIETU/Exam/2026 Date: - 06/01/2026 NOTICE As per 13.2 (b) of Ph.D. regulations of GIET University, every Ph.D. Candidate has to pay a onetime payment of 60,000 (INR Sixty Thousand only) towards examination fee for thesis evaluation at the time of submission of Ph. D. Synopsis. Now, the examination fee towards evaluation of Ph. D. thesis is revised and fixed as ¥70,000 (INR Seventy Thousand only) and this revised fees will be in effect from 01/01/2026. Hence the Ph.D. Scholars who submit the synopsis from the date of this notice are required to pay a onetime payment of ¥70,000 (INR Seventy Thousand only) towards thesis evaluation fees at the time of submission of their synopsis. W\ Vo Controller oft Examinations Memo No: |94 (_abj/GIETU/Exam Date: 06.01.2026 Copy to: The Vice-Chancellor / Registrar / Dean Academics / Dean SoET for information. All HoDs / Ph.D. Coordinators for information and necessary action. Accounts Section / Library / ERP / E-Class. GIET University Website/Notice Board. Controller of Examinations GIET University
